states.name: Elmina
states.title: Moonveiled Agent
states.description: Elmina works in the shadows as an special agent of the Red Dragon Organization. An existence of shadows, her missions are primarily espionage and infiltration... at times, even assassination. Only Luther and the upper echelons of the organization know her name. Her very existence is shrouded in secrecy.

states.name: Elmina
states.title: Moonveiled Agent
states.description: In the past, Elmina was taken in by the Church as an orphan, tasked with finding and bringing back vessels. Yet, as she came to learn the truth behind the Requiem, she began to feel sympathy for the girls. Eventually, she was taken in by Luther and the Red Dragon Organization, which proclaims the goal of creating a world without vessels. There, she began her path as a special agent.

states.name: Elmina
states.title: Moonveiled Agent
states.description:
"Your mission is to capture a girl who holds the fate of the world—and, if necessary, to take her life."
The moment Elmina received this order, she understood that, among the countless assignments she had carried out, this would be the most difficult and painful of them all.
